diagnosis: The player completed the level in 167 seconds with 6 deaths and 17 hits taken, all from combat. The trace shows extensive back-and-forth movement in the first ~60 seconds around the spawn area (x=60-260) before ascending, followed by repeated vertical traversal attempts with frequent falls back to lower tiers. Multiple combat deaths cluster at specific x-coordinates (1078, 1631, 959, 2633, 2892) indicating enemy placement at ladder tops or narrow corridors creates unavoidable damage zones. The player eventually reaches the exit after persistent retrying, rating it 3/5 with 'It was fun' — suggesting the core loop works but combat fairness needs tuning.

lessons.lesson: Enemy clusters at ladder exits or corridor chokepoints where the player must commit to a climb or jump create unavoidable damage zones that feel unfair rather than challenging.
conditions: enemies positioned at ladder tops or narrow corridor entries
player has no invincibility frames or dodge tools during climb/jump commitment
no safe observation point before engagement
lessons.outcome: repeated combat deaths at same locations, high hits taken, player stalls or quits
